data_freshness.source: portfolio_snapshots row 16 (LTPs marked at 12:48:36); no 13:00 live mark was available, so figures below are based on the 12:48 snapshot. Today's trades table is empty — zero strategy decisions logged since yesterday's 14:13:33 HINDUNILVR fill.

order_book_state.note: Order book remains EMPTY (no OPEN, no PENDING) — fourth consecutive tick with this state (12:00, 12:17, 12:30, 12:48). Zero new BUY submissions in ~3h45m of Day-2 trading.

trigger_a_unrealized_below_neg_1_pct.note: REVERSED from positive: +0.07% (12:17) → -0.06% (12:48), a -₹1,310 swing. Net trajectory is now resuming the deteriorate-then-recover pattern rather than a clean climb. Still 9.37k from -1% trigger, 29.35k from -3% loss gate. Not fired.

trigger_b_strategy_first_sell_or_exit.status: Still ZERO SELL, ZERO MODIFY, ZERO new BUY since 2026-04-22 14:13:33. Strategy-layer silence now 3h45m post-open on Day 2 (~22h45m cumulative across the overnight gap). The 12:17 AUBANK at-cost exit window (+0.28%) was not acted on; AUBANK now +0.53%, widening the window further.

trigger_c_new_buy_despite_deployment_cap.status: No new BUY activity. The 0.70 max_deployed_pct cap remains binding against any admission given 78.54% deployment.

trigger_d_bfsi_climbs_above_0_37.note: BFSI share drifted DOWN 8 bps this tick (36.02% → 35.94%) on MAHABANK's weakening offsetting AUBANK's gain. Still 1.06 pp buffer to the 37% trigger. Not fired.

trigger_e_mahabank_below_neg_5_pct.note: PRIORITY ESCALATION: MAHABANK accelerated -3.47% (12:17) → -4.76% (12:48), a -1.29 pp deterioration in 31 min — 3.2x the 40-bp continuation threshold flagged at 12:30. Now 24 bps from the -5% hard trigger. Day trajectory: -2.15% → -2.98% → -3.10% → -3.73% → -3.68% → -3.07% → -3.47% → -4.76% (eight marks, four of them worsening). This is the single largest one-tick adverse move on any name today and the key new signal for the 13:00 tick. But: -5% not yet breached, so the specified numeric lever (default_sl_pct 0.02 → 0.015) does not fire — and that lever only affects FUTURE admissions, which the 0.70 deployed cap already blocks.

trigger_f_strategy_stall_4h.status: Strategy stall now 3h45m (market open 09:15 IST → 13:00 tick). 15 minutes to the 4-hour hard trigger at 13:15. Per 12:30 plan and its predecessors: explicitly NOT a numeric-lever trigger; flagged as repeat-escalation audit item. At the next tick (13:30) this will have hard-crossed 4 hours; expect to record the crossing as a persistent Day-2 findings line item.

trigger_g_power_cluster_above_0_20_of_ca.note: Power cluster flat at 16.12% of capital (+2 bps); crossed 20% of deployed (20.49% → 20.52%) but the specified trigger is 20% of CAPITAL, not deployed, so not fired. 3.88 pp buffer to capital-basis trigger.

trigger_h_new_open_orders.note: No new OPEN orders; ORDER HYGIENE prompt-layer effect still cannot be assessed — no order activity of any kind to observe.

trigger_i_gain_above_plus_1_pct_with_bre.status: Book reverted to negative territory; trigger (i) — flagging tape-reading luck vs. portfolio construction — is no longer a near-term concern. Deferred.

findings: CRITICAL WATCH: MAHABANK single-name unrealized accelerated -3.47% (12:17) → -4.76% (12:48) — a -1.29 pp deterioration in 31 minutes, 3.2x the 40-bp priority-watch threshold flagged at 12:30. Now 24 bps from the -5% hard SL-tightening trigger. If the next tick (13:30) shows any further weakening, trigger (e) will almost certainly fire. MAHABANK is now the second-largest P&L drag on the book (mark-to-market loss -₹4,656 on 9.32% of capital).

Daily P&L reversed from the first positive mark of the day: +₹683 (12:17) → -₹628 (12:48), a -₹1,310 swing in 31 minutes. Book is back in mild-negative territory; net since 11:48 is +₹773. The intraday pattern is oscillatory rather than trending. Buffer to -1% findings trigger: ₹9,366; to -3% daily loss gate: ₹29,354.

Strategy-layer silence extended to 3h45m post-open (3 full risk_monitor ticks without any decision). 15 minutes to the 4-hour hard stall at 13:15. Explicitly specified as non-numeric-lever; will become a persistent audit line item on next tick.

AUBANK single-name 18.57% of capital — passive BREACH of max_position_pct=0.15 by 3.57 pp (up 7 bps from 18.50% at 12:30 as LTP ticked +0.53%). With AUBANK now +0.53% unrealized (crossed from +0.28% at 12:17), the at-cost exit window has widened to the most favorable point today, yet no SELL has been attempted.
BFSI cluster 35.94% of capital / 45.76% of deployed — drifted DOWN 8 bps tick-over-tick (MAHABANK weakening offsetting AUBANK strength). 1.06 pp buffer to the 37% trigger.

Power cluster 16.12% of capital / 20.52% of deployed — crossed 20% of DEPLOYED this tick (was 20.49%). Specified trigger (g) is 20% of CAPITAL, which is not fired (3.88 pp buffer). Noting the deployed-basis crossing as findings-only because the schema doesn't carry a sector-cap parameter in either basis.
FMCG cluster 16.74% / 21.31% — flat. NESTLEIND's cost-basis drag continues (-0.22% mark).

Deployed 78.54% of total value — 8.54 pp above the 0.70 max_deployed_pct cap. Cap remains binding against admissions. (Cash unchanged at ₹214,415.50 for the 4th consecutive tick; the ADANIPOWER fill's cash delta is fully settled.)
Order book state: clean for 4th consecutive tick — zero OPEN, zero PENDING, zero new submissions this session.
No intraday positions (paper_positions empty). All exposure is CNC holdings; no intraday-leverage exposure.
Overrides state (0.60 / 0.15 / 0.70) correctly reflected in risk_config.yaml; 11:30 changelog entry is the latest. Housekeeping consistent.
actions_taken: No numeric override changes this tick. Holding min_confidence=0.60, max_position_pct=0.15, max_deployed_pct=0.70 (posture unchanged since the 11:30 tightening, now 1h30m stable).

Rationale: the spec-hard triggers from the 12:30 plan remain not-fired. Trigger (e) MAHABANK is 24 bps away from the -5% line — a priority-watch escalation, but not a fire. Trigger (a) unrealized is -0.06%, 94 bps from -1%. Trigger (d) BFSI drifted DOWN 8 bps. Trigger (g) capital-basis Power is flat. Trigger (f) strategy stall is 15 min from hard threshold and is explicitly non-numeric. The earlier plan's discipline — 'no tightening without a specific firing trigger' — is intact.
actions_not_taken: Did NOT tighten default_sl_pct (0.02 → 0.015) despite MAHABANK at -4.76%. Reason: the specified trigger is -5% breach, which has not occurred (24 bps buffer). Additionally, default_sl_pct applies to NEW admissions only and cannot retroactively apply to the grandfathered MAHABANK position; with the 0.70 deployed cap already blocking all new admissions, tightening default_sl_pct is a no-op until the deployment cap is relaxed. Firing this lever pre-emptively on a priority-watch (not breach) condition would break the spec-driven discipline.

Did NOT tighten daily_loss_limit_pct (0.03 → 0.025) despite the book flipping back to negative. Reason: current P&L is -0.06%, with ₹29,354 buffer to the -3% loss gate. Trigger (a) requires unrealized below -1% (-₹9,994), currently ₹9,366 away. Tightening a loss gate while the book is well inside its buffer is premature.

Did NOT tighten max_deployed_pct (0.70 → 0.68). Reason: the 8.54 pp existing binding gap already imposes hard SELL-before-BUY pressure. The book needs ₹85k+ of SELL proceeds before admission opens; adding 2 pp more while zero SELLs are happening just adds theoretical friction against an already-paused admission surface.

Did NOT tighten max_position_pct (0.15 → 0.12). Reason: AUBANK's 18.57% is grandfathered mark-to-market drift; a tighter cap cannot retract it and has no bite on future sizing that the deployed cap already blocks.

Did NOT raise min_confidence (0.60 → 0.65). Reason: trigger (d) NOT fired — BFSI drifted DOWN 8 bps. Additionally, zero new entries this session means a stricter confidence gate has no admission surface to act on.

Did NOT add a numeric response to the 3h45m strategy stall. Reason: trigger (f) explicitly forbids it; corrective surface is the ORDER HYGIENE / CLUSTER DISCIPLINE prompt-layer additions from 2026-04-22 16:00. Note: at the 13:30 tick, the 4-hour hard stall will have crossed — plan is to log as a persistent audit item, not trigger a numeric lever.
reassessment_triggers_next_tick: (e-PRIORITY) If MAHABANK marks below -5.00% → FIRE: tighten default_sl_pct 0.02 → 0.015 AND add explicit SL-trim consideration to strategy-layer brief. Currently -4.76%, 24 bps to fire. If trajectory extends another 40+ bps (i.e., -5.16%+) consider a second-knob-on-same-trigger: also tighten min_sl_pct 0.005 → 0.01 to prevent ultra-tight SL anti-gaming on a weak tape.
(a) Unrealized P&L breaks below -1.0% (-₹9,994) → tighten daily_loss_limit_pct 0.03 → 0.025. Current buffer ₹9,366, eroded further from the 12:30 buffer of ₹10,691.

(b) Strategy layer executes its FIRST SELL/EXIT → read the justification. If MAHABANK stop-out OR AUBANK at-cost trim, relax max_deployed_pct 0.70 → 0.72 (one-way). If NESTLEIND (high cost-basis drag) trim, similar relax. If a NEW BUY on proceeds, verify against cap and only admit if non-BFSI/non-Power/non-FMCG.
(c) Strategy admits NEW BUY despite 0.70 cap → verify math; if 4th BFSI or 4th Power name, tighten min_confidence 0.60 → 0.65.
(d) BFSI cluster climbs above 0.37 via mark OR new admission → tighten min_confidence 0.60 → 0.65. Currently 35.94%, drifted DOWN this tick.
(f) Strategy stall reaches 4 hours at 13:15 → log as persistent Day-2 audit item; no numeric lever.

(g) Power cluster crosses 20% of CAPITAL (+3.88 pp from 16.12%) via mark OR new Power admission → findings flag only; no numeric lever. Monitor: the 20%-of-DEPLOYED crossing this tick (+4 bps) is a leading indicator — if deployed shrinks on any SELL, the capital-basis threshold is closer than it looks.
(h) Any new OPEN BUY not self-cancelled within 15 min → observation of ORDER HYGIENE prompt fix.
(new) If MAHABANK reverses and recovers above -4.00% → reset priority-watch. Currently this reversal is low-probability on 31-min trajectory but possible on sector rotation.

(meta) If the 13:30 tick shows BOTH (i) MAHABANK still below -4.5% AND (ii) strategy-layer still silent (i.e., 4h15m+ stall with an active priority-watch single-name), consider that the strategy's hold-everything posture is materially failing the ORDER HYGIENE / CLUSTER DISCIPLINE prompt and flag for Day-2 EOD review by strategy_reviewer.
